title: Cobblemon: Living Dex Sorter
description: Add commands to sort your PC. Adds option to include or exclude regional variants, prioritize shinies, and use duplicate Pokemon as placeholders for the rest of the evolution line.
body:
## Read

This is a server-side mod. Download it and insert it into your mods folder on your server. This mod also works client-side. I don't know if it's me or modrinth messing up the meta-data, but it won't link to the modpage in the app. Please check here for future updates.

### Features

🎮 Easy-to-Use GUI

Open with /livingdex settings — no complicated commands to remember

Chest-based interface that works server-side (no client mod required!)

Click items to adjust settings, toggle options, and sort your PC

📦 Smart PC Organization

Living Dex Sorting — Automatically places Pokémon in dex number order (#1 in slot 1, #2 in slot 2, etc.)

Duplicate Handling — Extra Pokémon go to designated duplicate boxes

Regional Form Detection — Alolan, Galarian, Hisuian, and Paldean forms sorted separately to variant boxes

Customizable Box Ranges — Choose which boxes are used for Living Dex, duplicates, and variants

✨ Advanced Options

Placeholder Mode — Use duplicate Pokémon to fill empty evolution slots (e.g., extra Eevee fills Espeon's spot until you catch one)

Shiny Priority — Optionally prefer shiny Pokémon for your Living Dex slots

Box Exclusion — Protect specific boxes from being touched during sorting

Box Renaming — Automatically rename Living Dex boxes to dex ranges (1-30, 31-60, etc.) or keep your custom names (1)

👥 Per-Player Settings

Every player has their own settings that persist between sessions

Settings stored server-side — works on multiplayer servers

Reset to server defaults anytime with one click

OP level 2 required

## Configuration

It is best to use boxes 1-35 for your living dex. This mod automatically renames the boxes for your living dex using an inclusive numbering system. Check the gallery to see it's features!


## Known Bugs

None. For now.

### Got a suggestion or want to report an issue?

Send me a message on discord @p.aradig.m
